question: Does the owner need an explicit copy-previous-plan operation in v1, and if so which category lifecycle changes must block or alter the copy?
context: Copy-forward may reduce maintenance without adopting inheritance or automatic rollover, but it must not silently revive inactive categories or stale amounts.
decision: v1 provides no dedicated copy-previous or inherited-plan operation. An Agent Host may read a prior revision and submit a new complete ordinary draft; a future PRD may reconsider only if measured representative maintenance exceeds 15 minutes.
